---
title: "Highlights"
format:
  pdf: 
   keep-tex: true
editor: visual
---

- Reproducible OSM--GSV framework to validate cycling-infrastructure change.

- Probability-based stratified audit across 1,063 Barcelona tracts.

- OSM reliably detects additions (precision 0.82; recall 0.96).

- Removals often reflect mapping edits rather than infrastructure loss.

- Framework enables calibration of OSM-based longitudinal analyses.
